title: Skill Remediation Planner: Using all completed audit artifacts below, create the prioritized remediation pl
prompt:
Using all completed audit artifacts below, create the prioritized remediation plan and write to EXACT path: teams/team_mn6rnabz_a43f0e/workspace/skill-remediation-plan.md.

Inputs:
1) teams/team_mn6rnabz_a43f0e/workspace/backend-capability-map.md
2) teams/team_mn6rnabz_a43f0e/workspace/skills-inventory.md
3) teams/team_mn6rnabz_a43f0e/workspace/skill-gap-analysis.md

Plan requirements:
- Prioritized roadmap (P0/P1/P2) with rationale tied to risk/impact.
- Concrete per-skill actions: update/remove/merge/create.
- Suggested ownership model and maintenance cadence for skills.
- Dependency ordering and quick wins.
- Acceptance criteria to consider the audit remediations complete.
- A compact implementation backlog table suitable for execution tracking.

Do not use legacy paths.
